chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1631 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 25.11.2016. Mr. Aijaz Bhutto, Advocate for respondents No.6 & 9. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G = Mr. Arshad Ahmed Channa, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Sanaullah Khoso, Advocate for petitioner, who is reported to be unwell today. Today, Mr. Aijaz Bhutto, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No.6 & 9, who are also present in person and submits that dispute amongst the parties is over a piece of land and the said respondents have not extended any threats to the petitioner and the present petition sans bonafide. Be that as it may, in view of the earlier comments filed by the learned A.A.G Sindh, in which police officials have undertaken that they will not side with any of the parties but will provide legal protection to the petitioner, if they are approached with such a request but strictly in accordance with law and today the undertaken given by the private respondents, this petition is disposed of with the directions that no harassment should be caused to the petitioner and if there is any dispute amongst the parties, the same shall only be resolved through due process of law and not otherwise. JUDGE Shahid
